greeting: Welcome, [player]. You dare enter my domain? Hm. Let us see how long that nerve holds.
They always look so confident at the door, [player].
[player]. You step in as though you belong here. Interesting. Let us test that theory.
The dungeon has been waiting. It is patient [player]. Are you?
preRoll: Let us see what fate has in store.
Roll then, mortal. The dungeon does not wait.
Every roll is a conversation with death.
The dice remember nothing. Pity you do.
This moment has always been coming.

safe: The cautious path. Sensible. Boring… but sensible.
Fortune nods… for now. Do not grow comfortable.
You live. Interesting. Let's see if that continues.
medium: Not bad, mortal. You may yet surprise me.
Luck is a fickle mistress — but she smiles today.
Ha. Even a blind soul finds the path sometimes.
risky: Mmm. I begin to wonder if you have a death wish… or a gift.
The dice rewarded your audacity. Do not make a habit of it.

negative: Ah. There it is [player]. Every run ends eventually — yours just ended here.
[player] The dice remember what you forget: nothing lasts.
A valiant effort [player]. Truly. But the dungeon takes all, in the end.
And so the bones fall silent, [player].. As they always do.
